glosses.vi: diễn đàn; diễn đàn trực tuyến
glosses.ja: フォーラム; オンラインフォーラム

sentences.target: Ich habe im Forum nach Tipps gesucht.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ɪm ˈfoːʁʊm naːx tɪps ɡəˈzuːxt/

translations.de: Ich habe im Forum nach Tipps gesucht.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ɪm ˈfoːʁʊm naːx tɪps ɡəˈzuːxt/
translations.en: I asked for tips in the forum.
translations.fr: J’ai cherché des conseils sur le forum.
translations.vi: Tôi tìm mẹo trên diễn đàn.
translations.nl: Ik zocht tips op het forum.
translations.nb: Jeg lette etter tips på forumet.
translations.sv: Jag letade efter tips på forumet.
translations.da: Jeg søgte efter tips på forummet.
translations.ja: フォーラムでコツを探した。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; forms the Perfekt with the past participle 'gesucht'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Neuter noun; dative singular as complement of 'in' in the PP 'im Forum' (location).
Preposition governing dative; forms the verb–preposition frame 'nach ... suchen' (= to look for).
Plural noun; dative plural as the prepositional object of 'nach' in 'nach Tipps'.
Past participle of the lexical verb; completes the Perfekt with 'habe' and appears in clause-final position.

sentences.target: Sie stellt die Frage im Forum.

translations.de: Sie stellt die Frage im Forum.
translations.en: She's posting the question in the forum.
translations.es: Ella publica la pregunta en el foro.
translations.fr: Elle poste la question sur le forum.
translations.pt: Ela publica a pergunta no fórum.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đăng câu hỏi lên diễn đàn.
translations.nl: Ze plaatst de vraag op het forum.
translations.hi: वह फोरम पर सवाल पोस्ट कर रही है।
translations.nb: Hun legger ut spørsmålet på forumet.
translations.sv: Hon lägger upp frågan på forumet.
translations.da: Hun lægger spørgsmålet ud på forummet.
translations.ja: 彼女はフォーラムに質問を投稿している。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; verb-second in main clause.
Definite article; feminine singular accusative marking the direct object 'Frage'.
Feminine noun; accusative singular as direct object of 'stellt'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative adjunct.
Neuter noun; dative singular as complement of 'in' in the PP 'im Forum'.

sentences.target: Im Forum bekomme ich schnell Antworten.

translations.de: Im Forum bekomme ich schnell Antworten.
translations.en: In the forum I get answers quickly.
translations.es: En el foro me responden rápido.
translations.fr: Sur le forum, on me répond vite.
translations.it: Sul forum mi rispondono in fretta.
translations.zh-Hans: 在论坛里我很快就能得到回复。
translations.yue: 喺論壇好快就有人回覆我。
translations.vi: Trên diễn đàn, tôi nhận được phản hồi rất nhanh.
translations.ar: في المنتدى أحصل على ردود بسرعة.
translations.nl: Op het forum krijg ik snel antwoord.
translations.hi: फोरम पर मुझे जल्दी जवाब मिल जाता है।
translations.nb: På forumet får jeg raskt svar.
translations.id: Di forum, saya cepat mendapat jawaban.
translations.sv: På forumet får jag svar snabbt.
translations.da: På forummet får jeg hurtigt svar.
translations.ja: フォーラムではすぐに回答がもらえる。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; clause-initial topicalized locative PP.
Neuter noun; dative singular complement of 'in' in the PP 'Im Forum'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; verb-second after topicalized PP; takes subject 'ich' and object 'Antworten'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject appearing postverbally due to inversion.
Adverb of manner modifying 'bekomme'.
Plural noun; accusative plural as direct object of 'bekomme'.

sentences.target: Du kannst den Link zum Forum posten.
sentences.reading: /duː kanst deːn lɪŋk tsʊm ˈfoːʁʊm ˈpoːstən/

translations.de: Du kannst den Link zum Forum posten.
translations.ipa: /duː kanst deːn lɪŋk tsʊm ˈfoːʁʊm ˈpoːstən/
translations.en: You can post the link to the forum.
translations.es: Puedes compartir el enlace del foro.
translations.fr: Tu peux partager le lien vers le forum.
translations.it: Puoi condividere il link al forum.
translations.ru: Ты можешь опубликовать ссылку на форум.
translations.pt: Você pode postar o link do fórum.
translations.he: אתה יכול לפרסם את הקישור לפורום.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể đăng liên kết đến diễn đàn.
translations.nl: Je kunt de link naar het forum posten.
translations.uk: Ти можеш опублікувати посилання на форум.
translations.hi: तुम फोरम का लिंक पोस्ट कर सकते हो।
translations.el: Μπορείς να δημοσιεύσεις τον σύνδεσμο για το φόρουμ.
translations.nb: Du kan poste lenken til forumet.
translations.id: Kamu bisa memposting tautan ke forum.
translations.sv: Du kan lägga upp länken till forumet.
translations.da: Du kan poste linket til forummet.
translations.ja: フォーラムへのリンクを投稿していいよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; selects the infinitive 'posten' in clause-final position.
Definite article; masculine singular accusative marking the direct object 'Link'.
Masculine noun; accusative singular as direct object of 'posten'.
Contraction of 'zu dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a PP modifying 'Link' (destination/target).
Neuter noun; dative singular as complement of 'zu' in the PP 'zum Forum'.
Main lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal 'kannst' and placed at the clause end.
